# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Use `AGENTS.md` as the shared source of truth for this repository.

Before making changes, inspect:

- `AGENTS.md`
- `docs/agentic/workflows.md`
- the relevant spec or plan under `docs/superpowers/`

Keep GitHub Copilot-specific notes here only when they cannot be expressed in the platform-agnostic `AGENTS.md`.
